note: Warmup runs load/compile caches; timed runs average infer_ms. infer_ms = frontend_ms_total+encoder_ms_total+decoder_ms_total (long audio) or per-stage ms without _total. total_wall_ms_avg = load_ms + audio_ms + infer_ms (from CLI counters). After warmup, load_ms should be small if compiled-cache-dir is stable.
